business: I run a personal training studio with 12 clients. I do weekly check-ins, set workout programs, and track progress photos.
rationale: Core PT use case: client check-ins, workout programming, progress photos. All three primary pt-companion features match directly.

business: Solo personal trainer working from home and at client homes. I track their workouts and body measurements each week.
rationale: Solo PT tracking client progress. Workout and measurement tracking is the pt-companion core. phone_today=false does not change the template pick.

business: Online fitness coach. I run group challenges and hold clients accountable through daily habit check-ins and exercise logs.
rationale: Fitness coaching with check-ins and exercise logs maps to pt-companion. The online delivery method does not shift to creator-companion because the primary value is client accountability, not content publishing.

business: I run a plumbing business. I visit sites, write up quotes on the spot, and need clients to sign and pay before I leave.
rationale: On-site quoting, signature capture, and payment are the exact feature set of service-quote. Plumbing is a canonical trade keyword.

business: Landscaping and lawn care company. I send my team out for estimates and we need a way to send quotes and book follow-up jobs from the field.
rationale: Field estimates and job booking from a team device is the service-quote back-of-house use case. audience=team confirms this is an internal operations tool, not a customer-facing workout tracker.

business: I do residential electrical work. My apprentices need to log job details, take site photos, and I review and approve quotes before they are sent.
rationale: Electrical trade with team-facing job logging and quote approval. service-quote handles on-site documentation and the approval workflow. phone_today=false does not change the template.

business: I am a social media content creator. I plan my posts two weeks in advance, schedule them across platforms, and track engagement ideas.
rationale: Content scheduling and multi-platform planning is the core creator-companion use case. Even audience=team (creator plus maybe a VA) does not override the content creation signal.

business: I manage social media accounts for small businesses. I need a way to plan content calendars, draft copy ideas, and keep my GHL sub-accounts organised.
rationale: Content calendar management plus explicit GHL mention are the two strongest creator-companion signals. Social media management agency maps cleanly to this template.

business: YouTube creator and podcast host. I batch-record content monthly and need help scheduling my posting queue and repurposing clips across TikTok and Instagram.
rationale: YouTube and podcast with cross-platform scheduling is the most literal creator-companion case. TikTok and Instagram are explicit creator-companion keywords.

business: I run a fitness coaching business that also sells online programs and posts workout content on Instagram.
rationale: Ambiguous: fitness coaching (pt-companion) plus Instagram content (creator-companion). The primary business activity is coaching clients one-on-one, which benefits from check-ins and workout tracking. Online program sales and Instagram are supplementary channels. The rule is: fitness coaching with a content side-channel favors pt-companion because the client relationship management screens are more valuable at this scale than a content scheduler.

business: I run a small business on Xero and I just want a phone-friendly view of my cash flow forecast and aged receivables before my Monday team meeting.
rationale: Explicit Xero mention plus cash flow and aged receivables (the two xero-companion buttons). audience=team confirms the owner is the user, not a customer. Maps cleanly to xero-companion.

business: I'm a bookkeeper handling 6 client Xero orgs. I want to glance at each client's accounts receivable from my phone before their weekly check-in.
rationale: Bookkeeper plus Xero plus accounts receivable. Pure backoffice glance use case. audience=team and the AR keyword both pull strongly toward xero-companion. phone_today=false does not change the pick.
